discoveries.name: Steel Plows
discoveries.description: Economy / Harvest I — ×1.5 harvest rate on every peon.

discoveries.name: Iron Tools
discoveries.description: Economy / Harvest II — +25% Peon harvest rate (stacks with Steel Plows).

discoveries.name: Logistics Doctrine
discoveries.description: Economy / Harvest III — peons carry 50% more per trip (×1.15 effective harvest).

discoveries.name: Grand Mill
discoveries.description: Economy / Harvest IV — additional ×1.10 effective harvest from labor-augmenting watermills.

discoveries.name: Bulk Baskets
discoveries.description: Economy / Cap I — +25 supply cap from larger storage baskets.

discoveries.name: Granary Vault
discoveries.description: Economy / Cap II — +50 supply cap from sealed granary vaults.

discoveries.name: Warehouses
discoveries.description: Economy / Cap III — +100 supply cap from large-block warehouse construction.

discoveries.name: Imperial Stores
discoveries.description: Economy / Cap IV — +200 supply cap from imperial-grade storage networks.

discoveries.name: Trade Route
discoveries.description: Economy / Trade I — unlocks the Trade widget; 1:1 swap of wood/stone/gold with any non-enemy faction.

discoveries.name: Bartering School
discoveries.description: Economy / Trade II — -15% trade-cost flag for the Trade widget.

discoveries.name: Guild Charter
discoveries.description: Economy / Trade III — Market building becomes constructible for ally-trade automation.

discoveries.name: Global Bazaar
discoveries.description: Economy / Trade IV — auto-1:1 swap any resource pair via Markets, no per-trade cost.

discoveries.name: Golden Coin Mint
discoveries.description: Economy / Tax I — flag enabling +5% gold from every income source.

discoveries.name: Toll Keeps
discoveries.description: Economy / Tax II — every Watchtower contributes +1 gold/sec from regional tolls.

discoveries.name: Regional Taxes
discoveries.description: Economy / Tax III — +1 gold/sec per Palace zone-of-control tile.

discoveries.name: Treasury Vault
discoveries.description: Economy / Tax IV — Palace generates +2 gold/sec from treasury vaults.

discoveries.name: Forged Blades
discoveries.description: Military / Infantry I — +5 attack damage to every combatant.

discoveries.name: Tempered Edges
discoveries.description: Military / Infantry II — +3 additional attack damage on Footman / Pikeman.

discoveries.name: Phalanx Doctrine
discoveries.description: Military / Infantry III — formation discipline; +5 more attack damage to Pikeman.

discoveries.name: Imperial Guard
discoveries.description: Military / Infantry IV — unlock Hero training from the Barracks.

discoveries.name: Iron-Tipped Arrows
discoveries.description: Military / Archer I — +1 attack range on every ranged combatant.

discoveries.name: Composite Bows
discoveries.description: Military / Archer II — +1 more attack range, Archer only.

discoveries.name: Volley Fire
discoveries.description: Military / Archer III — Archer attack damage +3.

discoveries.name: Masterwork Bows
discoveries.description: Military / Archer IV — Archer attack range +2 (capstone).

discoveries.name: Sapper Training
discoveries.description: Military / Siege I — siege engineering flag, -15% siege build time.

discoveries.name: Catapult Blueprints
discoveries.description: Military / Siege II — unlock Trebuchet training from the Barracks (in addition to Workshop).

discoveries.name: Reinforced Trebuchets
discoveries.description: Military / Siege III — Trebuchet attack damage +5.

discoveries.name: Seismic Engines
discoveries.description: Military / Siege IV — Trebuchet attack damage +10 (capstone).

discoveries.name: Armored Saddles
discoveries.description: Military / Cavalry I — Knight unlocked + base profile (when prerequisite met by chapter / starter).

discoveries.name: Barbed Spears
discoveries.description: Military / Cavalry II — Pikeman attack damage +3 (anti-cavalry counter).

discoveries.name: Charge Tactics
discoveries.description: Military / Cavalry III — Knight attack damage +5.

discoveries.name: Royal Cavalry
discoveries.description: Military / Cavalry IV — Knight attack damage +10 (capstone).

discoveries.name: First Contact
discoveries.description: Diplomacy / Relations I — Embassy half-cost flag; the Diplomat carries amnesty.

discoveries.name: Diplomatic Corps
discoveries.description: Diplomacy / Relations II — Diplomat trains 25% faster from Embassy.

discoveries.name: Royal Marriage
discoveries.description: Diplomacy / Relations III — +1 pact slot beyond the default 2.

discoveries.name: Universal Amnesty
discoveries.description: Diplomacy / Relations IV — auto-accept every incoming pact proposal.

discoveries.name: Exchange Policy
discoveries.description: Diplomacy / Trade I — open the Trade panel for resource swaps with non-enemies.

discoveries.name: Trade Treaty
discoveries.description: Diplomacy / Trade II — allies grant +10% harvest from shared trade.

discoveries.name: Shared Codex
discoveries.description: Diplomacy / Trade III — allied factions exchange a Discovery per match (you pick which).

discoveries.name: Trade Monopoly
discoveries.description: Diplomacy / Trade IV — 10% tribute payout from EVERY ally trade.

discoveries.name: Levy Tradition
discoveries.description: Diplomacy / Tribute I — open the Tribute panel; demand resources from weaker neighbors.

discoveries.name: Hostage Keep
discoveries.description: Diplomacy / Tribute II — vassals pay 2× tribute under threat of release.

discoveries.name: Extortion Doctrine
discoveries.description: Diplomacy / Tribute III — demand tribute from any non-ally faction (regardless of vassal state).

discoveries.name: Iron Fist
discoveries.description: Diplomacy / Tribute IV — vassals pay 4× tribute but break pacts twice as often.

discoveries.name: Mana Channels
discoveries.description: Magic I — Wizard cast cost reduced by 30%.

discoveries.name: Healing Conclave
discoveries.description: Magic II — Healer aura range +1 hex; +50% regen rate.

discoveries.name: Elemental Weave
discoveries.description: Magic III — Wizard attacks deal +5 damage AND ignore weather penalties.

discoveries.name: Rune Warding
discoveries.description: Magic IV — Watchtowers deal +25% damage to enemies adjacent to a Wizard.

discoveries.name: Starfall Rite
discoveries.description: Magic V — every 90s, Wizards channel a tile-strike (3-hex AoE, 40 damage) on the nearest enemy stack.

discoveries.name: Monumental Architecture
discoveries.description: Engineering I — Wonder build cost reduced by 20%.

discoveries.name: Masonry Guild
discoveries.description: Engineering II — Wall + Watchtower build time reduced by 40%; +25% Wall HP.

discoveries.name: Rampart Doctrine
discoveries.description: Engineering III — Walls automatically include arrow slits dealing 2 dmg/sec to adjacent enemies.

discoveries.name: Bridge Builders
discoveries.description: Engineering IV — Ferryman pathing across SHALLOWS becomes free (was ×1.8 cost).

discoveries.name: Siege Foundry
discoveries.description: Engineering V — Trebuchets get +50% range and +25% damage; cost +25% gold.

discoveries.name: Ancestral Vows
discoveries.description: Lore I — every faction you've allied with leaves a +5% morale bonus that persists if the pact ends.

discoveries.name: Saga of Strata
discoveries.description: Lore II — myth events fire 25% less often; their effects last 50% longer.

discoveries.name: Chronicler Codex
discoveries.description: Lore III — every Discovery shows its full prerequisite chain in the panel; +1 starting Discovery on every new game.

discoveries.name: Oracle Eye
discoveries.description: Lore IV — view a 90-second forecast of weather + raid events in the HUD.

discoveries.name: Eternal Flame
discoveries.description: Lore V — your Palace can't be destroyed while you hold ≥1 Wonder; +50% Wonder score multiplier.

discoveries.name: Formation: Phalanx
discoveries.description: Formations — unlocks Phalanx; spear stacks gain +50% defense.

discoveries.name: Formation: Cadre
discoveries.description: Formations — unlocks Cadre; melee stacks gain +25% damage.

discoveries.name: Formation: Wedge
discoveries.description: Formations — unlocks Wedge; heavy cavalry stacks gain +25% damage on the first attack.

discoveries.name: Formation: Skirmish Line
discoveries.description: Formations — unlocks Skirmish Line; ranged stacks gain +15% range.

discoveries.name: Formation: Square
discoveries.description: Formations — unlocks Square; defensive stacks gain +30% defense; cannot move while in formation.

discoveries.name: Formation: Combined Arms
discoveries.description: Formations — unlocks Combined Arms; mixed melee+ranged stacks gain +25% HP and +20% damage.
